theme: grinding shop where soft jobs dress the wheel
title: Dressing the Wheel: Scheduling Hidden Maintenance in a Grinding Shop
strategies: trivial: process jobs in the given order with no re-dressing (the baseline schedule)
greedy: run jobs biggest-first and re-dress whenever wear crosses a threshold -- treats wear as monotone and pays the reset cost repeatedly

strong: recognise the small soft jobs as disguised maintenance and interleave them just before hard clusters, keeping wear in a low band and spending explicit re-dresses only on the residual damage soft capacity cannot absorb
local search: polish any seed schedule with re-dress toggles and adjacent swaps
